items.name: 勇払会所の跡
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.description_en: This is a historic site (kinenbutsu), the site of the Yūfutsu kaisho (station office). It is municipally designated and located in Tomakomai City.

items.name: 蝦夷地開拓移住隊士の墓
items.category: 記念物(史跡・名勝・天然記念物)

en.name_romaji: Ezochi kaitaku ijū taishi no haka
en.name_en: Graves of the Ezochi Colonization Settlers
en.description_en: This is a historic site (kinenbutsu), the graves of settlers who colonized Ezochi. It is municipally designated and located in Tomakomai City.

items.name: 勇払恵比須神社奉納品21点

en.name_en: Twenty-One Votive Offerings of Yūfutsu Ebisu Shrine
en.description_en: This is a folk cultural property, comprising 21 votive offerings of Yūfutsu Ebisu Shrine. It is municipally designated and located in Tomakomai City.
This is a tangible cultural property, the gravestone of Hayashi Jūemon. It is municipally designated and located in Tomakomai City.

items.name: 錦岡樽前山神社 円空作樽前権現像および奉納品7点
items.description: 円空作樽前権現像および奉納品7点

en.name_romaji: Nishikioka Tarumaesan Jinja Enkū-saku Tarumae Gongen-zō oyobi hōnōhin nanaten
en.name_en: Enkū's Statue of Tarumae Gongen at Nishikioka Tarumaesan Shrine, with Seven Votive Offerings
en.description_en: This is a tangible cultural property, a statue of Tarumae Gongen carved by Enkū, together with seven votive offerings, held at Nishikioka Tarumaesan Shrine. It is municipally designated and located in Tomakomai City at Nishikioka Tarumaesan Shrine.

items.name: 勇武津不動及び奉納品7点

en.name_en: The Yūbutsu Fudō and Seven Votive Offerings
en.description_en: This is a folk cultural property, the Yūbutsu Fudō together with seven votive offerings. It is municipally designated and located in Tomakomai City.
